mission.accepted: Mission Accepted — Craft your prompt below
mission.already_done: You have already completed today's mission. Come back tomorrow!
mission.write_language: Use your preferred language, our wizards will do the rest.
mission.prompt_too_short: Prompt too short — write at least 10 characters
mission.add_context: Add more context or structure to improve your score
mission.good_length: Good length — try adding role, format, or constraints

auth.already_have_account: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.magic_sent: Welcome! Check your email to confirm your account.
auth.confirm_then_signin: Once confirmed, sign in with your email and password.

user.login_prompt_sub: Sign in to track your progress, earn badges and climb the leaderboard.
user.leaderboard_lock: Become the hero of the realm

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard 🏆
leaderboard.leaderboard_lock: Become the hero of the realm

social.preview_hint: In the realm, true friendship is forged in shared quests and loyal hearts.

friends.title: Friends
friends.locked: Friend features are still being expanded.
friends.remove_confirm_text: In the realm, parting with a trusted ally is a solemn farewell. Do you wish to sever this bond with {nickname}?

guild.title: Guild
guild.locked_title: Reach level 5 to unlock this fellowship
guild.locked_message: You have not unlocked guilds yet. Reach level 5 to create or join a guild and gather allies.
guild.ready_message: Create or join a guild to gather allies and face the weekend boss together.
guild.member_message: Your guild is ready. More guild features will arrive soon.
guild.member_hint: More guild tools are coming soon.
guild.preview_hint: Guild management and member tools are coming next.
guild.create_subtitle: Choose a strong name and a short invitation for your fellowship.
guild.description_placeholder: A few words about your guild
guild.name_exists: A guild with that name already exists.
guild.create_error: We could not create that guild.
guild.join_error: We could not join that guild.
guild.quit_confirm_text: Departing from a guild is a solemn act. You will lose your place among your companions. Are you sure you wish to leave {guildName}?
guild.kick_confirm_text: Are you sure you want to remove {nickname} from the guild?
guild.already_in_guild: You are already in a guild.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Realm
welcome.description: Questly is your daily training ground for the art of prompt engineering. Each day, a new quest awaits — complete missions to earn XP, rise in level, and forge alliances in guilds.
welcome.badge_hint: Hidden badges await the worthy. Explore every corner of the realm to uncover them all — can you find them?

coaching.title: How to improve
coaching.strong: You're already strong — try pushing your weakest dimension even further.

boss.title: Weekend Boss Battle
boss.summon_prompt: Be the first to attack and summon a boss!
boss.weekend_only: Boss battles only available on weekends (Saturday-Sunday UTC)
boss.boss_alive: Boss fights only available on weekends

quest_modal.score_hint: Score represents answer quality. Role bonuses apply: Wizard +50%, Royal Knight +20%

victory.title: 🎉 VICTORY! 🎉
victory.achievement_text: Your guild banded together and defeated {boss}! Well done, heroes! 🏆
victory.flavor_text: Check back next weekend for another boss battle!
